subject: Re:
body:
What is name of your island? 
------Original Message------
From: Jeffrey Epstein
To: Petra Nemcova
Sent: Jun 10, 2008 09:02
Subject: 

the earlier the better,, what helicopter company,, you must clear into st thomas, then they , if it is jet center, land you on my island  , or in the alternative , my heli and pilots will meet you at customs.


Lots of love, light and happiness,
Petra
